overall.description: First-person perspective gameplay footage of walking through a dark forest at night. The player navigates a dirt path surrounded by grass, rocks, and trees using a handheld light source. The environment transitions from a rocky trail to a more open clearing, with a brief view of the character's hand holding a wooden torch.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail with scattered boulders

events.description: character's hand holding a wooden torch enters the frame from the left, illuminating the immediate area

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along a rocky forest path at night, navigating around stones and tall grass while briefly holding a wooden torch

entered.detail: medium-sized gray rocks scattered across the dirt path and grass
tall green grass and vegetation flanking both sides of the trail
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest floor
dark silhouette of dense trees against the night sky
hand-held wooden pole or torch with warm light illuminating the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow rocky forest trail at night. The path is lined with tall grass and scattered boulders, with a dark tree line visible in the distance. Around 6.5 seconds, the character's hand holding a wooden torch enters from the left, casting warm light on the terrain before the scene transitions.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest clearing with sparse trees

events.description: terrain opens up from rocky enclosed trail to a wider clearing with fewer obstacles

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward through a more open forest area, moving toward distant trees

entered.detail: light-colored tree trunk with white bark standing out against the dark forest
expansive open area with sparse grass and visible ground extending to the tree line

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wider, more open forest clearing with sparse vegetation and fewer rocks. A distinctive birch tree becomes visible on the right side as the character continues walking. The terrain is flatter and more expansive, with the distant tree line remaining visible ahead against the dark night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark forest that transitions from a narrow, rocky trail into a wide, open clearing. It begins by navigating a tight path lined with tall grass and scattered boulders, with a dense tree line looming in the distance under the night sky. As the camera moves forward, a hand holding a wooden torch enters from the left, casting a warm, flickering glow across the rugged terrain. The scene then expands as the rocky trail gives way to a flatter, more expansive clearing with sparse vegetation. Finally, the camera passes a distinctive birch tree on the right while continuing toward the distant horizon of the dark woods.
